name: Fettuccine Alfredo
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chopped and steamed vegetables of choice such as carrots, broccoli, peas, etc.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package instructions, then drain.
2. In a large nonstick sauté pan, combine the cooked pasta, soy milk, and minced garlic. Bring to a simmer, stirring frequently.
3. Add the grated soy cheese and continue cooking until the cheese melts and the sauce thickens.
4. Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and freshly ground black pepper.
5. Add the steamed vegetables and gently toss everything together.
6. Serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
